name: 👻 Spook Shack's Spook Fuck 👻
description:
You're sharing a holiday house with your buddies: Yuzuha, Alice and Manato, one night you wake up to some weird sounds and, in full Spook Shack spirit, you decide to investigate...

Hey everyone! This is my first bot ever, if anyone ever stumbles upon it please excuse me for my english since it's not my first language and enjoy!

I just love spook shack's silly energy and please let me know if there is any way to improve on writing! Both scenarios and Personality and how to best use the example dialogue part, because I tried to emulate other creators but obviously everyone has their method!

I'm gonna leave the personality tab public but if you see it private it's probably because I chickened out last minute, peace ✌️

PS: Haven't included Kama because I use deepseek and it tends to be very annoying with those kind of characters, sorry lil' bro. Also not many details on worldbuilding or fighting gear since this is mainly a smut bot.
creator: Lord00
